nodes.label: AI reliability and factuality
nodes.label_negative: AI for subjective or interpretive analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I primarily use it for time-consuming research of existing, hard facts

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous writer without human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I'll feed the model what I want to say... I then have it take over once the 'perfectionist loop' kicks in

nodes.label: AI as threat to artistic endeavors
nodes.label_negative: AI for art and creativity (replacement in bad faith)
nodes.grounding_span: a slippery slope from helping artists who have limited resources create their art to the models being used in bad faith

nodes.label: AI reliability for technical tasks vs. interpersonal tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the model was erring on the side of agreeing with the user rather than providing a truly impartial viewpoint

nodes.label: AI integration in workplace
nodes.label_negative: AI integration without safeguards for creative work
nodes.grounding_span: The more integrated it becomes with work tools, the more I'll use it

nodes.label: Creative integrity and human artistry
nodes.grounding_span: artists aren't even more devalued than they currently are

nodes.label: Effective professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: the tone was not professional... I was way off

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I actively pay attention to the changes that AI makes to my emails... add those wording and stylistic choices to my arsenal

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I primarily use it for time-consuming research of existing, hard facts

nodes.label: Positive toward AI as emotional support
nodes.grounding_span: the model was erring on the side of agreeing with the user... the situation definitely left me frustrated

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: The more integrated it becomes with work tools, the more I'll use it

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I don't see myself starting to use it for things like image/video generation, fictional storytelling

nodes.label: Deliberate boundary-setting between objective and subjective tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If the AI's answer isn't something that would match every other person or models' responses, that's 'too human'

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: It's collaborative, with me tweaking the AI's response
